name: Curried Avocado Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the avocados in half with a knife and remove the pits. Set aside one half.
2. Scoop out the insides of the other three halves with a spoon and blend until smooth.
3. Stir in the curry powder, salt, pepper, cream, and remaining stock into the blended avocado mixture.
4. Chill the soup.
When ready to serve:
5. Garnish the soup with thin avocado slices from the remaining half, dipped in lemon juice.
6. Serve 4 to 6 portions.
